design_concept: A shocking, modern, editorial-meets-brutalist e-commerce landing page. We mix massive typography, stark 1px or 2px black borders (neo-brutalist), and overlapping bento grids to frame the product as a premium, fashion-forward piece. Vibrant CTA buttons (WhatsApp Green) break the monochrome structure to drive conversion.

components.button_secondary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-100 transition-colors px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold text-sm border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none
components.button_whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-black hover:bg-[#1DA851] transition-all px-8 py-5 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold text-xl border-2 border-black shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] flex items-center justify-center gap-3 w-full active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none
components.card: bg-white border-2 border-black shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] p-6 md:p-8
components.input: w-full border-2 border-black bg-white px-4 py-4 text-lg focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:bg-[#FDFBF7] transition-colors placeholder:text-neutral-500 rounded-none
components.radio_button: cursor-pointer border-2 border-black px-4 py-3 text-center font-bold transition-all peer-checked:bg-black peer-checked:text-white hover:bg-neutral-100
components.color_swatch: w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-2 border-black cursor-pointer shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-transform hover:scale-110

header.layout: Sticky top-0 w-full bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b-2 border-black flex justify-between items-center px-6 py-4 z-50
header.elements: Logo 'VENDER NA NET' in massive typography, right side 'COMPRAR AGORA' secondary button linking to product section.

hero.layout: Grid cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 min-h-[90vh] border-b-2 border-black overflow-hidden bg-[#FDFBF7]
hero.left_col: Flex flex-col justify-center p-6 md:p-16 border-b-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r-2 border-black relative
hero.content: Huge H1 'O LUXO DO CONFORTO', subtext 'Chinelos EVA Embossado direto da fábrica.', Badge floating 'Frete Grátis > R$100'. Right col displays the 'lifestyle_estudio' beige image occupying full space with object-cover.

product_configurator.wrapper: Grid cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 border-2 border-black shadow-[12px_12px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] bg-white overflow-hidden
product_configurator.gallery_side: border-b-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r-2 border-black bg-[#F4F4F4] relative flex items-center justify-center p-8
product_configurator.logic: React state to hold selected color. Gallery updates image based on color selected (bege, rosa_claro, verde_menta). Quantity selector buttons [-] [1] [+]. Size grid [35-36] [37-38] [39-40]. Form fields for Nome, Endereço, Payment Method. Price updates based on quantity (1=69.90, 2=89.90, 3+=...). Submit generates WhatsApp message.

benefits_bento.heading: H2 'POR QUE É O MELHOR?' mb-12
cards: Card 1: Solado Grosso (Col-span-1 md:col-span-2) bg-black text-white p-8 border-2 border-black
Card 2: Antiderrapante (Col-span-1) bg-white border-2 border-black p-8 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
Card 3: Leveza EVA (Col-span-1) bg-white border-2 border-black p-8 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
Card 4: Praia e Casa (Col-span-1 md:col-span-2) bg-[#FDE047] border-2 border-black p-8 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

testimonials.layout: bg-black text-white py-24 px-6 border-y-2 border-black
testimonials.content: H2 'O QUE DIZEM' in white. Grid of 3 brutalist cards with white backgrounds, black text, and black borders inside the black section. Images are round.

faq.style: H2 'DÚVIDAS FREQUENTES'. Accordion items with thick 2px black bottom borders. Question text in H4 font-bold.

footer.layout: bg-black text-[#FDFBF7] py-16 px-6 text-center border-t-2 border-black
footer.content: Huge text 'VENDER NA NET'. vendernanet.com.br. Legal links.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST build this strictly adhering to the Brutalist/High-Contrast Editorial design style. DO NOT use generic soft shadows; ONLY use the hard solid shadows specified (e.g. shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
Import Google Fonts: 'Bebas Neue' for headings and 'Manrope' for body in index.html or index.css.
Do NOT use a backend for ordering. The main CTA MUST be a standard anchor or programmatic window.open to `https://wa.me/5511942377344?text=...`.
The WhatsApp message must be dynamically constructed capturing all user inputs (Color, Size, Quantity, Total Price, Name, Address, Payment Method).
Price Logic: 1 unit = R$69,90, 2 units = R$89,90. If Quantity > 2, add R$44,95 for each additional unit (or maintain the bundle ratio). Free shipping text if total > 100.

Implement an image gallery in the product configurator that changes the displayed image depending on the color selected by the user. Fallback to a lifestyle image if studio image is not available for a specific color.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY form input, button, and interactive element.
